name: block-commit-on-type-errors
description: Prevents git commits when TypeScript type checking fails

rules.message:
🚫 Commit blocked: TypeScript type errors detected.

Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to see the errors and fix them before committing.

🚫 Commit blocked: TypeScript type errors detected.

Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to see the errors and fix them before committing.
